# Harsh Verma

> Open-source contributor, backend developer, and embedded systems enthusiast. NIT Hamirpur EE student building real-world software.

Personal developer portfolio at heyharsh.me — single-page site covering projects, blog/journal posts, explorations, and contact info.

- [Portfolio](https://heyharsh.me/): Hero, work/projects, journal, explorations, skills, and contact sections.
